basic_details.job_title: Govt. Multi Specialty Hospital Chandigarh – House Surgeon – 37 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Govt. Multi Specialty Hospital Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 for 37 posts of House Surgeon. Candidates with M.B.B.S Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Govt. Multi Specialty Hospital Chandigarh official website.

qualification.education_qualification: M.B.B.S from recognized university and Internship completed

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nrhmchd.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: Govt Multi Specialty Hospital Chandigarh House Surgeon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 37 Posts
